title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a memory layer that persists across different AI agents and tools, storing encrypted memories owned by the user. It enables context continuity when switching between different LLM providers like Claude, Codex, and Pi through a single-prompt setup.
